reviews.review_text: Its truly a great place lovely people amazing view you can even live here permanently and a huge shout out to the staff as well just a well maintained piece of heaven

Great place. I stayed 3 months for work.
The owners are very welcoming and friendly, nothing is a drama, the best place to stay in all of the Singleton area, would stay there again.
Very quiet mountain views friendly staff great rates recommend a stay here

My wife rang them and they were rude and disrespectful. 0 out of 10 customer service. Would not recommend going there. Couldn’t believe the way my wife was treated. I am more than ropable. Absolutely disgusting
Beautiful country location on a working farm with friendly hospitable owners and very convenient to Broke and Pokolbin vineyards
Very nice place and Barry is a great host.
Fantastic place to stay. Run by an amzing family who go out of their way to help. Great hospitality, great amenities and great experience! Definitely recommend staying here.
